name: pinta-cc
description: Generic OTLP forwarder for Claude Code hook events. Converts hook events into OTLP/HTTP spans and sends them to any OpenTelemetry-compatible collector.

endpoint.title: OTLP endpoint
endpoint.description: OTLP/HTTP traces endpoint. Pinta Manager auto-fills this. OSS users: any OTel collector.

api_key.title: OTLP authentication
api_key.description: Token sent as x-pinta-relay-token header. Pinta Manager auto-fills.
